garden_mapping_intent.multi_sensor_domain: map config, UDP, ROS, vehicle parameter, and watchdog surfaces
garden_mapping_intent.chi_D_axis: detect residual or unmapped drift surfaces in telemetry/config structure
garden_mapping_intent.closure_gate: identify where state should be admitted, blocked, or carried as null/error pass
garden_mapping_intent.rule: full repo surface carried; no selected-symbol narrowing
